prompt: We have the selected use cases, the platform design and the release plan for a retail banking client. Now we need a work breakdown with effort estimates. How should I run this?
assertions: Response correctly infers this is Phase A (the user has Session 2 outputs and wants estimates) without asking the user to clarify Phase A vs Phase B
Response presents the structured four-phase session layout with output files
Response sequences the work as task inventory first, then T-shirt sizing, then person-day roll-up â€” not jumping straight to a headline number
Response indicates estimates will carry low and high person-day bounds rather than single-point figures
